title: Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:The_Dangerous_Games.jpg]] |title=''Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games'' |author=[[Jude Watson]] |cover artist=*[[Alicia Buelow]] *[[David Mattingly]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[August]] [[2002]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=0439339197 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]] |series=[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (novel series)|''Star Wars: Jedi Quest'']] |preceded by=[[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi|''The Trail of the Jedi'']] |followed by=[[Jedi Quest: The Master of Disguise|''The Master of Disguise'']] }} '''''Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games''''' is the third in a [[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (novel series)|series]] of young reader novels that chronicle the adventures of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] between [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] and [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']]. Narration for the audio version was performed by [[Jonathan Davis]]. ==Publisher's summary==
'''Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker.'''
'''Master and apprentice.'''
'''Chosen by fate. Destined for conflict.'''
''When Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker are sent to the Galactic Games, they are meant to be keepers of the peace. Then they discover an illegal event that Anakin knows all too well: Podracing. Even though Obi-Wan forbids it, Anakin cannot resist the thrill of the race—and the chance to face off against his childhood rival, the loathsome Sebulba''. ''As a Jedi, Anakin is supposed to let go of his past. But his past will not let go of him.'' ==Plot summary== A [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] security team is on [[Euceron]] during the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] and discovers a plot engineered by the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]] to discredit certain [[Senator/Legends|Senators]] by implicating them in illegal [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]]. Meanwhile, reports of an outlawed [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] competition in the [[Cave/Legends|caves]] of Euceron draw [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker’s]] curiosity, and he finds that [[Hekula]], son of [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]], is [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] his old [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]]. Anakin volunteers to enter the race on behalf of the [[Tyerell family|Tyerell brothers]] to free their [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] sister. ==Continuity== The book stated that [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin]] had not [[Podracing/Legends|raced]] since he was eight [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, when in fact he was nine years old during the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Podrace]] that saw his liberation. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|0439339197}}; [[August]] [[2002]], [[Scholastic]],
